nodes.x: Now Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,
¶ And the sons of Benjamin were Belah, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.
¶ The sons of Benjamin after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites: of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites: of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites:
¶ And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,
¶ The sons of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.
And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,
Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
And Zanoah, and En-gannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,
And Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baal-meon:
And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the family of the Ardites: and of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.
And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.
And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,
And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,
And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,
And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
And these are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:
And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.
The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
¶ These are the sons of Seir the Horite, who inhabited the land; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,
The sons of Salma; Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
And Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.
And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.
And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,
And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.
And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
And Abram and Nahor took them wives: the name of Abram’s wife was Sarai; and the name of Nahor’s wife, Milcah, the daughter of Haran, the father of Milcah, and the father of Iscah.
And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:

And Terah took Abram his son, and Lot the son of Haran his son’s son, and Sarai his daughter in law, his son Abram’s wife; and they went forth with them from Ur of the Chaldees, to go into the land of Canaan; and they came unto Haran, and dwelt there.
And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
And she bare him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.
And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sons, heads of the fathers.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.
And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.
And Solomon begat Roboam; and Roboam begat Abia; and Abia begat Asa;
And the sons of Pallu; Eliab.
And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,
The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:
Lod, and Ono, the valley of craftsmen.
¶ And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in that land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

after the name of his wife Sêdêqêtêlĕbâb. 1 17. And behold these three cities are near Mount Lûbâr; Sêdêqêtêlĕbâb fronting the mountain on its east; and Na’êlâtamâ’ûk on the south; ’Adatanêsês towards the west. 18. And these are the sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad--this (son) was born two years after the flood--and Lud, and Aram. 2 19. The sons of Japheth: Gomer and Magog and Madai…
¶ Now these are their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.
And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the children of Keturah.
Beriah also, and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:
And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,
And of the sons of Bebai; Zechariah the son of Bebai, and with him twenty and eight males.
And Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.
And thus Ammon was carried before the king who was over the land of Ishmael; and his name was Lamoni; and he was a descendant of Ishmael.
And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,
And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,
And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,
And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,
And Adoraim, and Lachish, and Azekah,
And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
And of the sons of Immer; Hanani, and Zebadiah.
And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;
Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;
¶ And the sons of Asher; Jimnah, and Ishuah, and Isui, and Beriah, and Serah their sister: and the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,
And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sons of Becher.
And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,
And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;
And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;
Of the sons also of Bebai; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, and Athlai.
And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,
And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
And Ziklag, and Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susah,
And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphalet.
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
And Elishama, and Beeliada, and Eliphalet.
And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,
And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.
And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
And of the sons of Harim; Eliezer, Ishijah, Malchiah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,
And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel the Mesobaite.
And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,
And Ahijah, Hanan, Anan,
And of the sons of Bani; Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.
And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,
And Janum, and Beth-tappuah, and Aphekah,
And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;
And of the sons of Pahath-moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief men. These dwelt in Jerusalem.
These chief fathers of the Levites were chief throughout their generations; these dwelt at Jerusalem.

And these were the heads of the house of their fathers, even Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, and heads of the house of their fathers.

¶ Now these are the chief of the province that dwelt in Jerusalem: but in the cities of Judah dwelt every one in his possession in their cities, to wit, Israel, the priests, and the Levites, and the Nethinims, and the children of Solomon’s servants.
These were the renowned of the congregation, princes of the tribes of their fathers, heads of thousands in Israel.
And Moses by the commandment of the Lord sent them from the wilderness of Paran: all those men were heads of the children of Israel.
And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife’s name was Maachah:
¶ And in Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jehiel, whose wife’s name was Maachah:
And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

And the name of the man was Elimelech, and the name of his wife Naomi, and the name of his two sons Mahlon and Chilion, Ephrathites of Beth-lehem-judah. And they came into the country of Moab, and continued there.
¶ And Abner the son of Ner, and the servants of Ish-bosheth the son of Saul, went out from Mahanaim to Gibeon.
Three years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.
And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,
And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,
And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.
And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.
And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,
And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,
And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,
And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.
And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.
And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
Also of the Levites; Jozabad, and Shimei, and Kelaiah, (the same is Kelita,) Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
And these are they that conspired against him; Zabad the son of Shimeath an Ammonitess, and Jehozabad the son of Shimrith a Moabitess.
And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.
¶ And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
And Joiada begat Jonathan, and Jonathan begat Jaddua.
¶ The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
And Kish was the father of Saul; and Ner the father of Abner was the son of Abiel.
And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begat Micah.
And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal: and Merib-baal begat Micah.
And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea, and Ahaz.
And Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;
And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begat Micah.
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,
And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,
And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:
And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.
Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.
And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,
And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan: these were the sons of Azel.
Of Zebulun, Ishmaiah the son of Obadiah: of Naphtali, Jerimoth the son of Azriel:
Of Dan, Azareel the son of Jeroham. These were the princes of the tribes of Israel.
And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,
And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.
And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.
And of Benjamin; Eliada a mighty man of valour, and with him armed men with bow and shield two hundred thousand.
And there fell of Benjamin eighteen thousand men; all these were men of valour.

And Asa had an army of men that bare targets and spears, out of Judah three hundred thousand; and out of Benjamin, that bare shields and drew bows, two hundred and fourscore thousand: all these were mighty men of valour.
These are the sons of Benjamin after their families: and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and six hundred.
